[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: Fix [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] pipeline: async webhook + PAT swap
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/246
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1040
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1041
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/182
  
  Details:
  Fixed the `[RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT]` submission pipeline (`dapp/store_interaction_history.html` -> Edgar -> GitHub -> Google Sheets). Two distinct bugs were causing every status update with an attachment to disappear from the Hit List workbook's `Stores Visits Field Reports` tab AND from `TrueSightDAO/store_interaction_attachments`.
  
  ## What changed
  
  1. **Routed all submissions through Edgar (Plan B ŌĆö async webhook).** The DApp was issuing a direct cross-origin POST to GAS (`action=log_field_report_attachment`) which silently failed every time ŌĆö GAS doPost from a browser is unreliable cross-origin. Replaced with the canonical Telegram-Chat-Logs scanner pattern used by `[SALES EVENT]`, `[QR CODE EVENT]`, and `[REPACKAGING BATCH EVENT]`:
     - DApp now only POSTs the signed event to Edgar.
     - Edgar enqueues `WebhookTriggerWorker` against the new GAS action `processRetailFieldReportsFromTelegramChatLogs`.
     - The new GAS scanner reads Telegram Chat Logs, dedups against `Stores Visits Field Reports` col G (`update_id`), and updates Hit List Status + DApp Remarks + Stores Visits Field Reports atomically.
     - Removed `apply_hit_list_gas_update_from_retail_report!` (sync helper) and its dead `stores_gas_exec_base` companion.
  
  2. **Swapped the GitHub PAT used for attachment uploads.** Edgar's `submit_contribution` had a hardcoded fine-grained PAT that didn't include `TrueSightDAO/store_interaction_attachments` ŌĆö that's why no commits ever appeared. Switched to `Rails.application.config.github_pat`. Old hardcoded PAT lines kept commented for forensic reference.
  
  3. **Verified `config.github_pat` scope on every TrueSightDAO repo `submit_contribution` may upload to** via a `GET -> PUT -> DELETE` probe (no commits left behind):
     - `TrueSightDAO/.github` ŌĆö 200 / 201 / 200
     - `TrueSightDAO/store_interaction_attachments` ŌĆö 200 / 201 / 200
     - `TrueSightDAO/ecosystem_change_logs` ŌĆö 200 / 201 / 200
     Documented this scope inline above `config.github_pat` in `application.rb` so future PAT rotators know the list.
  
  4. **Cleaned up the DApp page** ŌĆö removed the broken `logFieldReportAttachmentRow` helper, the now-unused `STORES_NEARBY_API_URL` constant, and refreshed the help text under "Update Store Information" to describe the new Edgar-only flow.
  
  ## Deploys
  
  - `clasp push` + `clasp deploy --deploymentId AKfycbwB2zqNV9nMCMWs2hSa8FecjA36Oh-mSVuz3pk8TpXrXcy9dvqOqgbWIirNka2LmacgPw` on the Stores Nearby script (`1NpHrKJW...`) ŌĆö bumped @28 -> @29, `/exec` URL preserved.
  - `./deploy.sh --skip-migrate` against Edgar production hosts `seni_ror` (port 3002) and `seni_sk` ŌĆö both restarted clean. `https://edgar.truesight.me/ping` returns `{"status":"success"}`.
  
  ## Verification (post-deploy)
  
  First scanner fire after deploy: `processed=10 skipped=7 errors=0` ŌĆö drained the entire backlog of previously-failed submissions. Idempotent replay: `processed=0 skipped=17 errors=0` ŌĆö every row's `update_id` is recorded on `Stores Visits Field Reports` and dedup is working.
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - TrueSightDAO/tokenomics ŌĆö https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/246 (async GAS scanner + thematic folder + Version.gs bump)
  - TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer ŌĆö https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1040 (async webhook wiring + GitHub PAT swap)
  - TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer ŌĆö https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1041 (config.github_pat scope documentation)
  - TrueSightDAO/dapp ŌĆö https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/182 (drop cross-origin GAS POST; refreshed help text)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 400.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
